description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with two jobs, pages and platformio, both running in the default stage. The pages job runs only on the master branch, executes "apt-get update && apt-get install -y doxygen", then "doxygen doxygen/Doxyfile", moves the generated HTML with "mv doxygen/documentation/html/ public/", and publishes the public/ directory as a Pages artifact. The platformio job runs a before_script that runs "apt-get update -qq && apt-get install -y -qq python-pip" followed by "pip install platformio", then its script runs "platformio ci --lib="." --board=nodemcuv2 test/basic/test_main.cpp -O \"build_flags = -Werror\"" and "platformio ci --lib="." --board=esp32 test/basic/test_main.cpp -O \"build_flags = -Werror\"". No custom Docker image or services are defined, and the pipeline relies on the default runner image.
